_patch_meta.produced_by: Claude AI — closing status patch for Reg 23 and Reg 111
_patch_meta.description: Closing status patch for Registry 023 (compassion) and Registry 111 (mercy). Session B analytical work for both registries is complete — word studies, analytical briefs, CC directives, and all data patches applied. The session_b_status was not advanced in any of the analytical patches because those patches targeted specific tables (mti_term_flags, wa_dimension_index, etc.) and did not carry session_b_status in _patch_meta. This patch corrects that. Note: Reg 68 grace is already at Analysis Complete — not touched here. Note: Reg 68 verse_context_status = In Progress is a separate anomaly requiring investigation.

operations.description: Advance Reg 23 compassion session_b_status from Verse Context Reset to Analysis Complete
Advance Reg 111 mercy session_b_status from Verse Context Reset to Analysis Complete
